title: Find All Numbers Disappeared in an Array
description:
Given an array `nums` of `n` integers where each value is in the range
`[1, n]`, return an array of all the integers in `[1, n]` that **do not appear**
in `nums`.

solutions.summary: Record present values, then collect the absent ones in order.

steps.title: Record which values are present
steps.explanation: A set of the array gives O(1) membership tests.

steps.title: Collect the missing values
steps.explanation: Check every candidate from `1` to `n`; keep the ones not in the set.
